hooks.command: APP_ID=$(if [ -n "$CURSOR_TRACE_ID" ]; then echo "com.todesktop.230313mzl4w4u92"; elif [ "$TERM_PROGRAM" = "vscode" ]; then echo "com.microsoft.VSCode"; elif [ "$TERM_PROGRAM" = "iTerm.app" ]; then echo "com.googlecode.iterm2"; elif [ "$TERM_PROGRAM" = "Apple_Terminal" ]; then echo "com.apple.Terminal"; else ps -p $PPID -o comm= | xargs -I {} osascript -e "id of app \"{}\"" 2>/dev/null || echo "com.apple.Terminal"; fi); terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Code' -subtitle "📁 $(basename $PWD)" -message '✅ Claude has finished a task.' -sound Glass -execute "/tmp/activate-window.sh '$PWD' '$APP_ID'"

APP_ID=$(if [ -n "$CURSOR_TRACE_ID" ]; then echo "com.todesktop.230313mzl4w4u92"; elif [ "$TERM_PROGRAM" = "vscode" ]; then echo "com.microsoft.VSCode"; elif [ "$TERM_PROGRAM" = "iTerm.app" ]; then echo "com.googlecode.iterm2"; elif [ "$TERM_PROGRAM" = "Apple_Terminal" ]; then echo "com.apple.Terminal"; else ps -p $PPID -o comm= | xargs -I {} osascript -e "id of app \"{}\"" 2>/dev/null || echo "com.apple.Terminal"; fi); terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Code' -subtitle "📁 $(basename $PWD)" -message '⏳ Claude is waiting for your input.' -sound Ping -execute "/tmp/activate-window.sh '$PWD' '$APP_ID'"
